value:
Hi there,

Thanks for reaching out, and I apologize for the delay in getting back to you on this. I can see you've provided your case references, and I want to help move this forward. Since you've already submitted all the required documentation, the next step is for me to escalate this to your case officer directly to get you an update on the status and timeline. You should expect to hear from them within the next business day or two.

In the meantime, if there's anything else I can clarify or any additional information you need from us, please let me know.
